Task.Name: SE-01 System Requirements Review (SRR)
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Downstream traceability work on SE-05 (RTM) is constrained by open interface requirements in SE-03 sections 4–6, which are blocked pending RF specifications from Hardware.

Task.Name: SE-02 System Design Document
Task.Notes:
BLOCKER: The RF interface section (remaining 15%) cannot be completed until HW delivers the final RF specs. | RISK: Two things need to happen in parallel. First, HW needs to deliver the RF specs by end of next week — that's the critical path item. Second, once I have them, I need two days to close the SDD and roughly three to four days to complete ICD sections 4 through 6. After that, SE-06 can accelerate, but we're still looking at significant catch-up work given it's only at 10%.
If you can get HW to commit to a firm delivery date on the RF specs, I can give you a hard revised estimate for PDR readiness. Right now I'm planning around the end-of-next-week deadline, but I don't have that commitment in writing.

Task.Name: SE-03 Interface Control Documents (ICDs)
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Sections 4–6 of the ICDs are blocked on receipt of RF specifications from an external dependency. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-04 CONOPS Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: CONOPS work is being deliberately held pending resolution of the RF spec issue and stabilization of upstream documents (SDD and ICD), which must reach a closeable state before substantive CONOPS work can begin. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-05 Requirements Traceability Matrix
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: The remaining 60% of the RTM is gated on resolution of the RF interface specification issue and closure of the affected ICD sections. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-06 Preliminary Design Review (PDR) Package
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: The PDR package cannot progress until the SDD and ICDs close out, which are blocked by an unresolved RF spec issue, with completion contingent on HW delivering by end of next week.

Task.Name: SE-07 System Safety Analysis
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Substantive work is gated on ICD closeout due to the RF spec issue, as stable interface definitions are required before the core analysis can proceed. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-08 Reliability Analysis
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: ICD approval is blocked by an unresolved RF spec issue, preventing the start of Reliability Analysis which requires approved interface definitions as input. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-09 Critical Design Review (CDR) Package
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: CDR is sequentially dependent on PDR completion, and the RF spec situation creates downstream schedule pressure that could delay CDR if PDR slips.

Task.Name: SE-10 Verification & Validation Plan
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: The V&V Plan cannot start until RTM and ICD are complete, both of which are blocked by an unresolved RF spec delivery from the hardware team.

Task.Name: HW-01 RF Front End Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Tool license contention on the lab cluster is backing up simulation runs, risking a slip in the HW-05 fab start if sims cannot close by early May.

Task.Name: HW-02 Signal Processing Board Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: A key engineer is on medical leave for approximately three weeks, reducing team capacity to partial coverage. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-03 Power Supply Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: It's just sequencing — hasn't hit its start date yet. Nothing blocking it right now. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-04 Antenna Array Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Progress is stalled pending receipt of updated antenna aperture requirements from Alice's ICD before the design can be finalized. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-05 RF Front End Prototype Fabrication
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: RF Front End Prototype Fabrication cannot start because HW-01 simulations have not closed out due to a license contention issue. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-06 Signal Processing Board Fabrication
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Fabrication cannot begin until the upstream HW-02 design work advances further, which is itself delayed by a medical leave situation.

Task.Name: HW-07 Antenna Array Fabrication
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Antenna Array Fabrication cannot begin until the design (ICD) is complete.

Task.Name: HW-08 Hardware Unit Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Hardware Unit Testing cannot start until predecessor tasks HW-05, HW-06, and HW-07 are all complete.

Task.Name: HW-09 Environmental Stress Screening
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Environmental Stress Screening is downstream of unit testing and inherits all the same upstream blockers preventing that task from progressing.

Task.Name: HW-10 Hardware Acceptance Test
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Three upstream blockers — a license contention issue, a medical leave coverage gap, and an ICD hold from Alice — are preventing progress and threaten to slip this task's date.

Task.Name: SW-05 User Interface Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: SW-05 is intentionally on hold pending closure of SW-02 (architecture peer review) before UI development can begin.

Task.Name: SW-06 Database Design and Implementation
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Waiting on final data interface specs from the systems team before the database schema structure can be finalized.

Task.Name: SW-08 Software Integration Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: SW-08 has a dependency on hardware availability for the integrated test bed, which is a coordination risk with the HW lead.

Task.Name: SW-09 Software Qualification Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: SW-09 cannot begin until SW-08 (Integration Testing) closes out, as Qualification Testing is downstream of Integration Testing.

Task.Name: IT-01 Integration Test Plan
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Integration Test Plan cannot be started until the system requirements baseline is finalized, as writing against an open baseline would require rework.

Task.Name: IT-02 Lab Setup and Calibration
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Two required signal analyzers are currently allocated to another program, and setup cannot proceed until they are released and the calibration equipment request is fulfilled.

Task.Name: IT-03 Hardware-Software Integration
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Hardware-Software Integration is blocked by two dependencies: incomplete lab setup (equipment issue) and the software team not yet delivering a stable release candidate build to integrate against.

Task.Name: IT-04 System Functional Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: System Functional Testing is blocked by unresolved lab and software build issues upstream in the Hardware-Software Integration chain.

Task.Name: IT-05 System Performance Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: System Performance Testing cannot begin until H/W-S/W Integration is complete, creating a dependency-chain block shared with Functional Testing.

Task.Name: IT-06 Environmental Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: A confirmed chamber reservation at the environmental test facility has not yet been received, blocking the start of Environmental Testing.

Task.Name: IT-07 Regression Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Regression Testing remains blocked by the same upstream dependency chain previously discussed.

Task.Name: IT-08 Test Readiness Review
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: TRR is blocked by all upstream test sequence tasks being incomplete and undocumented, inheriting all previously described blockers.

Task.Name: IT-09 Acceptance Test Procedure Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: ATP Development is blocked pending closure of the requirements baseline, as writing stable procedures against a moving target is not feasible.

Task.Name: IT-10 System Acceptance Test
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: System Acceptance Test remains at 0% due to upstream dependencies on requirements baseline, lab equipment, software build, and environmental chamber slot — all unresolved blockers from earlier in the chain.

Task.Name: PM-03 Monthly Status Reports
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: The second report is in draft and cannot be finalized until outstanding inputs are received from several CAMs.

Task.Name: PM-04 Earned Value Management Reporting
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: A few CAMs have not yet closed out their actuals, which is holding up finalization of the current report.

Task.Name: PM-06 Subcontractor Management
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Several subcontractors have been slow providing their schedule data, causing delays in completing the first formal performance review cycle.
